criticism, practice of judging the merits and faults of something or someone, also known as critique. Attributes include: 
- subclass of: "critique"
- Commons category: "Criticism"
- said to be the same as: "critique"
- different from: "Anvillea"
- instance of: "journalism genre",

- described by source: "Encyclopædia Britannica 11th edition"
